---
title: "My Storyboard at IAS - pages"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard) # always
```

<!-- links -->
```{r}
map1link=
viz1=url(map1link)

map2link=
viz2=url(map2link)
```

Sidebar {.sidebar}
=====================================


I can give some textual explanation here!

Chapter 1
===================================== 



### GIVE ME A TITLE 1

```{r}
readRDS(viz1)
```


Chapter 2
===================================== 



### GIVE ME A TITLE 2

```{r}
readRDS(viz2)
```

Chapter 3
===================================== 


### GIVE ME A TITLE 3

```{r}
readRDS(viz1)
```

Chapter 4
===================================== 


### GIVE ME A TITLE 4

```{r}
readRDS(viz2)
```
